'''Eror Zeen''' was the capital city of [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Danoor]]. The city was composed of squat buildings no taller than four stories, and blue-white [[Glowrod/Legends|glowlamps]] lit the streets.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Galaxy's Edge|book=The Kathol Outback|reprint=yes}}
